---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What would you like LLMFlex Windows to do?

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the behavior you want. If this affects Codex config/auth files, explain the expected safety behavior.

## Scope

Check any that apply:

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Secret storage
- [ ] Codex config/auth safety
- [ ] GUI/tray app
- [ ] Provider support
- [ ] Packaging/distribution
- [ ] Other

## Security And Privacy Notes

Do not include API keys, auth files, or private config values. Replace sensitive examples with `REDACTED`.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?
